audience_belief_to_challenge: Buyers evaluate pricing tiers by counting features
core_mechanism: Anchoring changes perceived value before feature details are compared

proof_anchors:
---
proof_id: proof_01
summary: Studies show the first price seen creates a reference point
source_ids: src_01
usage_note: Use in the hook
---

safe_claims:
---
claim_id: claim_01
claim: Anchoring changes perceived value when the higher-price option is presented first
supporting_proof_ids: proof_01
---

beat_claim_plan:
---
beat_id: beat_01
beat_name: Hook
goal: Make the pricing mistake feel obvious
claim_ids: claim_01
proof_anchor_ids: proof_01
counterargument_ids:
transition_note: Lead with the familiar mistake
---
